hero.headline: You already know you should be using AI. The problem is nobody knows where to start.
hero.headlineHighlight: The problem is nobody knows where to start.
hero.sub: We train professionals and teams across LATAM to use AI in their real work — in their language, with their context, without a single line of code.

problems.title: You're not the only one stuck here.

items.title: Everyone's talking about AI but nobody actually knows how to use it well
items.desc: The tools are there. The pressure is real. But between the noise, the options, and the day-to-day, nobody knows where to start.

items.title: You've tried tools that got abandoned after a week
items.desc: Not because they were bad. Nobody understood them well enough to make them stick.

items.title: Every explanation has so much jargon you end up more confused than before
items.desc: AI doesn't have to be a programming project. You just need someone to explain it in your language, applied to your actual work.

tiers.label: For Professionals
tiers.name: Squai One
tiers.partnership: For professionals and entrepreneurs who want to use AI in their daily work, no technical background required.
tiers.description: 1:1 sessions tailored to your role and what you actually do every day.
items: Free 30-minute discovery call before you commit to anything
1-hour sessions booked when it works for you, using examples from your real work
Tools and techniques you can apply from the very first session
No technical background required, no jargon, no generic content
tiers.priceNote: Per session. Paid upfront to reserve your spot.

tiers.label: For Teams
tiers.name: Squai Grow
tiers.partnership: For small and mid-sized companies that want to understand AI and learn to use it on their own, without depending on anyone.
tiers.description: A training program built around your team and your context.
items: Free 60-minute discovery call and training proposal within 48 hours
Three training packages: Starter (10h), Growth (20h), and Pro (40h)
Up to 10 participants per group, with the squad member best matched to your team
From Growth: a written diagnosis of AI opportunities across your processes
Virtual sessions or in-person at your offices, available in Manizales, Colombia

tiers.label: Implementation
tiers.name: Squai Build
tiers.partnership: For companies that want their processes and workflows optimized with AI, built to fit how they actually work.
tiers.description: Every implementation is different. We start with a diagnostic session to understand your operation and define the scope and investment together.
items: AI integrations built around how your team actually works
Scope and investment defined together, no surprises
Squad assigned based on your project's technical profile
tiers.priceNote: Contact us to define the right scope for your operation.

howItWorks.title: How It Works

steps.name: Discovery Call
steps.description: A free 30-minute call for professionals and entrepreneurs, 60 minutes for teams and companies. We learn how you work and recommend the right program.

steps.name: Training Proposal in 48 Hours
steps.description: You receive a clear training proposal in under 48 hours: program outline, sessions, deliverables, and investment.

steps.name: Kickoff
steps.description: We align on schedule, format, and expectations. The program starts on your terms — virtual or in-person at your offices.

steps.name: Training Program
steps.description: Live sessions run by the squad member best matched to your profile. Practical, applied to your real work, in your language.

steps.name: AI Opportunities Diagnosis
steps.description: A written document with concrete AI opportunities for your company's processes, with clear and prioritized recommendations.

steps.name: Keep Growing
steps.description: When the program ends, you have the tools to apply AI in your work from day one.

howItWorks.subtitle: A clear process, no unnecessary steps, so AI becomes part of your work and stays there.

industries.title: Industries We Serve
industries.marqueeTitle: We work with people and teams in

items.title: No jargon, no code
items.desc: We teach AI in plain language. You just need to know your work — we take it from there.

items.title: Applied to your real work, not to demos
items.desc: Every session uses examples from your role and your context. What you learn on Tuesday you can use on Wednesday.

items.title: The right squad member for you
items.desc: We assign whoever best fits your profile and your industry — not the same specialist for everyone.

items.title: You leave with tools, not dependency
items.desc: The goal is for you to finish with the tools and confidence to keep applying AI on your own.

squad.title: Meet the Squad
squad.sub: Every program assigns the squad member who best fits your profile. You always work with real people — not a platform, not a bot.

members.desc: If you want to understand how to use AI to work better, be more productive, and make sharper decisions every day, you'll work with her. No code, no jargon — applied to your real work.
If your team is technical and wants to understand how to build, integrate, and scale AI solutions, he leads that part of the program.
If you need to understand and document how your processes work today before automating anything, you'll work with him. Clarity first, AI second.
If your company has valuable information that's scattered or poorly documented, she helps you organize it so AI tools can actually use it.
If you need to understand where your data lives, how reliable it is, and what needs to be in order before AI can work with it, he's your starting point.
If you want your team to adopt AI without putting your company's information at risk, he teaches you what to protect and how to do it from day one.

contactModal.title: Tell us what you're working on
contactModal.description: Write to us or book a free call. No long forms, no waiting.
contactModal.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell us briefly what you want to improve with AI in your work…
contactModal.successMessage: Your call is scheduled. Check your email for the details.
contactModal.errorSlotTaken: This time slot is no longer available. Please choose another.
contactModal.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contactModal.errorRescheduleForbidden: This reschedule link does not match your email.
contactModal.stepDetailsDesc: Almost there, tell us about you
contactModal.noSlots: No available slots for this date. Please choose another day.
contactModal.privacyRequired: You must accept the privacy policy
contactModal.privacySuffix: . Your data is used solely to respond to your inquiry.

ctaSection.headline: Take the first step without committing to anything.
ctaSection.sub: A free 30-minute call to understand where you are and what program makes sense for you. No pressure, no sales pitch.

sections.heading: Who we are
sections.body: Squai is responsible for processing the personal data collected through this website. If you have any questions, you can reach us at heysquai@gmail.com.

sections.heading: What data we collect
sections.body: When you use our contact form, we collect your name, email address, and the message you write. We do not collect any other personal data.

sections.heading: Why we collect it
sections.body: We use your data solely to respond to your inquiry. We will not use it for marketing, profiling, or any other purpose.

sections.heading: Third parties
sections.body: To deliver our response to you, we use Resend as our email-sending service. Your data may be processed by this provider in accordance with their own privacy policy. We do not share your data with anyone else.

sections.heading: How long we keep your data
sections.body: We keep your data for up to 1 year after your inquiry. After that period, it is permanently deleted.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You can also withdraw your consent. These rights apply regardless of where you are located.

sections.heading: How to exercise your rights
sections.body: To exercise any of these rights, send us an email at heysquai@gmail.com. We will respond within 30 days.

footer.tagline: You already know you should be using AI. The problem is nobody knows where to start.

rescheduleResume.message: You closed your reschedule flow. You can continue whenever you want.

schedule.heading: Your AI Strategy Session is confirmed!

schedule.problemQuestion: Your answer to "What problem are you facing?":
schedule.rescheduleText: If something comes up and you can't make it, don't worry. You can find a better time by clicking {{cta}}.
